title: About Zats Green Score
subtitle: Evaluate the eco-design maturity of your digital projects.

whatIs.title: What is Zats Green Score?
paragraphs: Zats Green Score is an open-source tool for evaluating the environmental impact and eco-design practices of digital projects, particularly APIs and web services.
It helps teams identify areas for improvement and track their progress toward more sustainable digital practices.

types.name: API Green Score
types.description: Based on the API Green Score methodology, this evaluation focuses on API design best practices for eco-design: architecture, data management, caching strategies, and more.

types.name: EROOM (EOF v1.1)
types.description: Based on Boavizta's EROOM Optimization Framework, this evaluation measures the optimization potential of digital services across multiple dimensions: product, architecture, infrastructure, and more.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Zats Green Score is open source and available on GitHub. Contributions are welcome!
